5966116.label: PL1700_vo_ETC_comeback_2
5966116.transcript: Did you think a little pain would stop me?

10040883.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
10040883.transcript: We won't turn tail and run, but you already knew that.

13710950.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
13710950.transcript: It was easy following your lead.

18117413.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
18117413.transcript: You've honed both sword and spell.

27671062.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
27671062.transcript: You're not the first Fire Breather I've followed into battle.

28553371.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
28553371.transcript: If it keeps this crew safe, I don't mind playing the bad guy.

32129216.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
32129216.transcript: Fire on me if you have to. I can take it.

32931450.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
32931450.transcript: Is today the day my scythe tastes the blood of a god?

34355348.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
34355348.transcript: We're coming through, Generals, whether you invite us in or not.

35330965.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
35330965.transcript: You'll get no mercy from me.

42384389.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
42384389.transcript: You don't know fear, do you?

49800580.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_pose_5
49800580.transcript: You want more? That can be arranged.

50811453.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
50811453.transcript: I can always count on you.

62250808.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
62250808.transcript: I vowed to protect this crew. Promise kept.

64504642.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
64504642.transcript: Stay close. I won't let them lay a finger on you.

70773563.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
70773563.transcript: Don't let that Draconic power consume you.

71923102.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
71923102.transcript: Let me stop you there. This is not a road you want to go down.

73931890.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
73931890.transcript: You're going to die, simple as that.

76585352.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
76585352.transcript: Who do you think I am?

78684193.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
78684193.transcript: Hmm. Can't rest on these laurels.

107364254.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
107364254.transcript: That man has a few screws loose.

109993274.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_PL1600
109993274.transcript: I'd like you to lose so fast.

112531092.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_break
112531092.transcript: Oh, we'll do more than that.

113032762.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
113032762.transcript: Keep hacking away. It'll come down eventually.

115866077.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
115866077.transcript: This is for the chaos you've sown in our skies.

116110413.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
116110413.transcript: Whoever wants to die first, step on up.

120700882.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
120700882.transcript: Anything could happen in a place like this.

124957385.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
124957385.transcript: Damn, you might be my match.

126221451.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
126221451.transcript: You've earned your title, Rose Queen.

128944796.label: PL1700_vo_NAV_just_move_reaction_PL1600_2
128944796.transcript: You could do this all day.

131311690.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
131311690.transcript: The air feels heavy. Exercise caution.

143821529.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
143821529.transcript: You could save a few for me.

162692607.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
162692607.transcript: It'll take more than a pile of swords to stop me.

164897613.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
164897613.transcript: Believe me, we will come out on top.

165841094.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
165841094.transcript: Grannoth, may you howl with rage.

185430301.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
185430301.transcript: Hmm. You want to see me get serious?

188477604.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0000
188477604.transcript: There's more where that came from.

195977363.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
195977363.transcript: Our friend is busy. Leave her alone.

202990272.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
202990272.transcript: Looks like nothing is going to change your mind.

214273415.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
214273415.transcript: The world needs my protection now more than ever.

214347803.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
214347803.transcript: This is more than a mission. This is my duty.

224407129.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
224407129.transcript: You fight like a bull. Not bad.

227232530.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
227232530.transcript: Listen, Vane. You lift spirits, and that's the greatest strength of all.

250557910.label: PL1700_vo_ATK_ability_4_2
250557910.transcript: You have two options. Leave or die.

255540378.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
255540378.transcript: They fall so easily, don't they?

256386544.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
256386544.transcript: These flunkies will fall to my blade.

275905261.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
275905261.transcript: I can't take all the credit.

277448689.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
277448689.transcript: Alright, let's tip the balance of power.

277476740.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
277476740.transcript: I'm tired of fighting these husks.

282325114.label: PL1700_vo_ETC_box_check_l_3
282325114.transcript: They still make them like this.

286843792.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
286843792.transcript: The armor. Go for the armor.

295000993.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
295000993.transcript: Push forward. They can't match our strength.

299056924.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
299056924.transcript: Just call them back if they get too close to the blade.

301107834.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
301107834.transcript: With healing spells like yours, you're the first person I'd tell.

306358225.label: PL1700_vo_MOV_wait_B_2
306358225.transcript: Seems to be in working order.

312534476.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
312534476.transcript: Keep moving. The last thing we want is to get surrounded.

314732631.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL1600
314732631.transcript: What a pleasant partner I have.

321839833.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
321839833.transcript: Look, kid. The strong earned their power by defending the weak. Don't ever forget that.

323998528.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
323998528.transcript: There is nothing we can't do.

339887974.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
339887974.transcript: I feel the same way about your pack.

347519126.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
347519126.transcript: You swing the sword, I'll be the shield.

349839452.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_call_emergency_3
349839452.transcript: Come on! Pick up the pace!

354810486.label: PL1700_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1600_2
354810486.transcript: You took that one on the chin.

356194939.label: PL1700_vo_NAV_throw_dispel_reaction_1
356194939.transcript: Not what you planned, is it?

368268843.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
368268843.transcript: Sorry. I'm under orders to keep it close. You understand.

379231382.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
379231382.transcript: We may have won the battle, but...

400258250.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
400258250.transcript: I could get used to cover fire like yours.

401906145.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
401906145.transcript: Got it. I won't fail you.

413630018.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_recovery_A_3
413630018.transcript: Didn't even know I was hurt.

420172112.label: PL1700_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
420172112.transcript: Hmm. No one faces me and walks away.

429802755.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
429802755.transcript: This barren landscape makes it easy to cover our flanks.

430665330.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
430665330.transcript: Such a foe poses no threat to us.

448967544.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
448967544.transcript: That's right. No one gets past me.

454594901.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_4
454594901.transcript: It'll take more than that to kill me.

457121678.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
457121678.transcript: Keep your head in the game.

460909201.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_buff_F_PL1600
460909201.transcript: I won't pull a single punch.

464038418.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
464038418.transcript: Why do I feel proud of you?

470009223.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
470009223.transcript: Forget these ants. Get to the monastery.

484766881.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
484766881.transcript: My home is on the front line.

489338443.label: PL1700_vo_ETC_lockon_4
489338443.transcript: If you value your life, you'll run.

494047623.label: PL1700_vo_ETC_quest_start_2
494047623.transcript: This will be a nice warm-up.

498052609.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
498052609.transcript: I'm just glad to be of use.

501990436.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
501990436.transcript: I'm used to working as a pair.

503845788.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
503845788.transcript: You've made your choice. Now suffer the consequences.

517550395.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
517550395.transcript: No one likes a sore loser, Lilith.

520697502.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
520697502.transcript: You've got no brains and no chance.

523948790.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
523948790.transcript: Chance and folly guide the flow of battle.

528160441.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
528160441.transcript: Come on, Id! Can't you hear us?

534005702.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A
534005702.transcript: I can always count on you.

536567565.label: PL1700_vo_ETC_lockon_1
536567565.transcript: You won't lay a finger on this crew.

543964267.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
543964267.transcript: We won't accept your twisted dream.

547479995.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_4
547479995.transcript: One more chance. I'll take it.

552643736.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
552643736.transcript: Don't worry. I know my limits.

555138966.label: PL1700_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
555138966.transcript: Great Scythe Grenoth, I beseech you!

556173531.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
556173531.transcript: We need to match our timing.

556415706.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
556415706.transcript: Only if you use it for evil.

566178791.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
566178791.transcript: Your frost versus my blade. I don't like your chances.

571816935.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
571816935.transcript: Not a bad dance partner, am I?

573208852.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
573208852.transcript: Hold nothing back. I can take the heat.

576549507.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
576549507.transcript: A woman after my own heart.

580881814.label: PL1700_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
580881814.transcript: Hmm. Hate me if you want.

599764516.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
599764516.transcript: Just point me in their direction.

602901363.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
602901363.transcript: Blow with all your might, Wind Primal. You can't uproot me.

606344060.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
606344060.transcript: Desperation causes panic. Push her to the breaking point.

608110765.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
608110765.transcript: This is a fight to the death. Good.

608303755.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
608303755.transcript: Me? Kind? Don't let the others hear you say that.

610271711.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
610271711.transcript: Always happy to lend a scythe.

613780440.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
613780440.transcript: Took the words right out of my mouth.

613925456.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
613925456.transcript: I like the way you think.

616837670.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
616837670.transcript: The helmet comes off for no one.

630622515.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
630622515.transcript: How do we topple this giant?

638225758.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
638225758.transcript: Why bother with faith when I have the trust of my crewmates?

643167860.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
643167860.transcript: Slow and steady wins the race.

649978284.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
649978284.transcript: Alchemy makes for a very loud fighting style.

652395568.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
652395568.transcript: What can I say? I'm built different.

666608413.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
666608413.transcript: And yet you haven't even shown half your capability.

669415188.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
669415188.transcript: Keep at it. The day is ours.

671265716.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
671265716.transcript: Not bad, considering we seldom work together.

671462908.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
671462908.transcript: Struggle as much as you like. It won't change your fate.

686062045.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
686062045.transcript: Though I can no longer feel pain, I felt the heat of your flames.

688002744.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_2
688002744.transcript: I like where this is going.

694159450.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
694159450.transcript: Hmm. My work speaks for itself.

694281369.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
694281369.transcript: I'll cleave us our way through.

700720991.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
700720991.transcript: Worry about surviving. Everything else comes second.

707326271.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
707326271.transcript: My scythe will cut right through your gales, beast.

710872751.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
710872751.transcript: We have work to do, Grinoth.

732839444.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_weakpoint
732839444.transcript: We won't let a single foe escape.

733695436.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_4
733695436.transcript: We need you in the fight.

736564872.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
736564872.transcript: Okay. Does that mean keep a lookout?

738695190.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
738695190.transcript: Like two peas in a pod. How cute.

742991023.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
742991023.transcript: Do your worst. It won't stop me.

755071819.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
755071819.transcript: This guy needs to get his head checked.

755197962.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_regret_1
755197962.transcript: Not worth my salt, am I?

776901899.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0000
776901899.transcript: If he can't do it, no one can.

783581019.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
783581019.transcript: I do wield one giant claw.

786873177.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
786873177.transcript: We certainly had every angle covered.

794011537.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_2
794011537.transcript: We can't rest easy just yet.

796854362.label: PL1700_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_3
796854362.transcript: Heal up before you really hurt yourself.

799640086.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
799640086.transcript: Protect our friends and we won't have problems.

800745507.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
800745507.transcript: Personally, I think you're far more terrifying.

814528148.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
814528148.transcript: He cleaned them up with his bare hands.

815509652.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_4
815509652.transcript: You don't want to miss all the fun.

818430241.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
818430241.transcript: The boy's grown on me. Damned if I abandon him now.

820442535.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_1_FIRST
820442535.transcript: Again, this man bars the way.

823711942.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
823711942.transcript: I will spare nothing in defense of this crew.

825368643.label: PL1700_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_C
825368643.transcript: This is going to get ugly.

843534185.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
843534185.transcript: You started this fight, and now we're ending it.

846309733.label: PL1700_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
846309733.transcript: Hmm. They were no match for us.

849062261.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
849062261.transcript: Some burdens you just gotta bear, or the past might catch up to you.

849491660.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
849491660.transcript: You always have that air of mystique.

849935520.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
849935520.transcript: Dragon's blood makes for a vast reserve of power.

864814954.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
864814954.transcript: A man after my own heart.

866404192.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
866404192.transcript: Let's prep for the next one.

870172764.label: PL1700_vo_NAV_get_snp_2
870172764.transcript: I vow to protect these crabs.

879999064.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
879999064.transcript: These are toys compared to Atomigods.

890784829.label: PL1700_vo_ETC_lift_stay_line
890784829.transcript: I could do this all day.

895518716.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
895518716.transcript: Let's grind that worm into mush.

896321635.label: PL1700_vo_ETC_quest_start_1
896321635.transcript: Alright. Let's get this mission started.

899644980.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
899644980.transcript: Come, there are more battles ahead.

911250464.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
911250464.transcript: Yet it's an insignificant little twig compared to the enormity of my regret.

912628584.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
912628584.transcript: The worst is yet to come.

918561298.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
918561298.transcript: Just one of my many strong suits.

940594261.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
940594261.transcript: I don't know. He does a good job of thrashing our foes.

944688506.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
944688506.transcript: I haven't felt pain or fear in the longest time. Too long, really.

952463512.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
952463512.transcript: Didn't know we had such perfect sync.

953748742.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
953748742.transcript: If it's to protect this crew, I'll bear any pain.

956793988.label: PL1700_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
956793988.transcript: They're going to bring the heat now.

961664733.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_1
961664733.transcript: We put some effort into that one.

964515803.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_win_5
964515803.transcript: Hmm. This crew is under my protection.

964705368.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
964705368.transcript: We cut through them like butter.

969382617.label: PL1700_vo_ATK_ability_4_1
969382617.transcript: I don't fear death. Death fears me.

975366390.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
975366390.transcript: Still keeping up the cute act after that fight? You've got stamina.

978958458.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
978958458.transcript: Never met a foe it couldn't handle.

979960252.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
979960252.transcript: Hmm, this one's got bite to him.

980466010.label: PL1700_vo_ETC_lockon_5
980466010.transcript: They must have a death wish.

989762187.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
989762187.transcript: I'm warning you, Ada. Let us pass.

992561278.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
992561278.transcript: We've got a bit of ground to cover.

993831339.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
993831339.transcript: Want my advice? Retreat while you still can.

999832588.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_recovery_A_PL1600
999832588.transcript: Took too much heat back there.

1004616618.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_overdrive
1004616618.transcript: I wouldn't have it any other way.

1019729627.label: PL1700_vo_MOV_wait_cold_6
1019729627.transcript: Well, at least I can't feel the cold.

1039395799.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
1039395799.transcript: Stand in my way. See where that gets you.

1046254780.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
1046254780.transcript: I like the sound of that.

1052867927.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200
1052867927.transcript: Tiny frame or not, your strength is brutal.

1056570524.label: PL1700_vo_ATK_ability_5_2
1056570524.transcript: Leave the front line to me.

1057255214.label: PL1700_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_A
1057255214.transcript: So they were holding out on us.

1062296532.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
1062296532.transcript: Good work finding the enemy's blind spot.

1062660753.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
1062660753.transcript: Hmm. This body has endured far worse.

1072934614.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL1600_2
1072934614.transcript: That's what you get for charging ahead.

17125121.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
17125121.transcript: If you've got the strength, wield it.

41858920.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
41858920.transcript: Better to protect this crew with.

64755626.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
64755626.transcript: Hmm. Not sure if I should be happy about that.

77153540.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
77153540.transcript: Fine, but I'm taking the Vanguard.

87250226.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
87250226.transcript: Trust me, you're enough already, Vane.

115702346.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
115702346.transcript: It seems you've honed your holy arts to a new level.

125671438.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
125671438.transcript: You've come into your own, Id.

136718561.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
136718561.transcript: Just point me in the right direction.

256299576.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
256299576.transcript: Don't get too drunk off that bloodlust, Gallanza.

273935705.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
273935705.transcript: I need you to be the backbone of our onslaught.

276018269.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
276018269.transcript: Hmm. How do you stay so many steps ahead?

283268704.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
283268704.transcript: I know you've got more in you.

294072593.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
294072593.transcript: You've got quite some bite behind your kicks, I'll give you that.

298490828.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
298490828.transcript: My scythe shall lead the way.

310769821.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
310769821.transcript: Good work on the tag team, partner.

311848147.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
311848147.transcript: You and I, we share similar natures, don't we?

331368232.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
331368232.transcript: Good. What use is this scythe if not to reap death?

331564462.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
331564462.transcript: Especially not after we trample them.

340721158.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
340721158.transcript: Let's just say I've had some work done on this body.

351924702.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
351924702.transcript: That was helpful, but don't get reckless.

380510209.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
380510209.transcript: Then you put the guts in Gutsy.

389971511.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
389971511.transcript: Best keep it to the imagination.

396535867.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
396535867.transcript: Huh, that speed is next level.

419514008.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
419514008.transcript: Don't worry about friendly fire. My body can take it.

451371231.label: PL1700_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL2600_3
451371231.transcript: Back off and take a breather.

456392889.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL2700_2
456392889.transcript: Eustace, still got fight in you.

459260490.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
459260490.transcript: For all that power, I can tell you're still holding back.

469620355.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
469620355.transcript: Run or rust on my scythe.

473668203.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL2600_3
473668203.transcript: You don't want to miss all the fun.

475050039.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
475050039.transcript: Join me for a post-work drink?

479574015.label: PL1700_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL2700_1
479574015.transcript: Get on that first aid, Eustace.

535340600.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL2700
535340600.transcript: I know. We'll see this through.

537110183.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
537110183.transcript: Fine by me, as long as it works till the bitter end.

538849614.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
538849614.transcript: Yeah, got a lot of bad memories.

551573082.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
551573082.transcript: A bit rich coming from you.

591670319.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
591670319.transcript: Sure, whatever works best for the team.

608081505.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
608081505.transcript: Not sure how you made that sound more menacing than me, but you did.

609225985.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
609225985.transcript: Well, now I've seen the scariest thing in the skies.

700546223.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
700546223.transcript: Good. Then we see eye to eye.

707224091.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
707224091.transcript: Holding back there, Eustace? You know I can take the punishment.

710197190.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
710197190.transcript: You channel absolute savagery on the field. Not that I'm one to talk.

715560178.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
715560178.transcript: Use me as a launch pad if you need to.

756718994.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
756718994.transcript: The obvious generals aren't half bad.

770976664.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_PL2600_3
770976664.transcript: Sear that pain into your memory.

780899607.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
780899607.transcript: Fine. I'll take you up on that.

799565605.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
799565605.transcript: Respect, huh? Even when it's the fearless who pick the worst fights?

799896288.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_recovery_B_PL2700
799896288.transcript: Maybe I have been too reckless.

806613724.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
806613724.transcript: The Eternals live up to their reputation.

822695430.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
822695430.transcript: Couldn't afford to take my focus off the enemy.

823122949.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL2700_3
823122949.transcript: Yeah, looks like everything's still working.

830913009.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
830913009.transcript: I'll take the Vanguard for the next fight.

860122335.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
860122335.transcript: Fall back. Let me handle the front.

893334583.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
893334583.transcript: I'd say you've almost got too much power.

914512787.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
914512787.transcript: As long as I don't cross it.

926920034.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
926920034.transcript: If it blocks our way, I'll wipe it out.

927431290.label: PL1700_vo_NAV_just_move_reaction_PL2700_3
927431290.transcript: You get sharper by the day.

951976398.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_buff_A_PL2700
951976398.transcript: Just tell me who to slice.

956207348.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
956207348.transcript: Yeah, much better than my usual.

958541807.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0000
958541807.transcript: I'll always be there whenever you need me.

972336227.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
972336227.transcript: Hubris is a common killer, Beatrix.

975413867.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL2600_3
975413867.transcript: Hmph. Ilsa rubbing off on you?

1013540165.label: PL1700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
1013540165.transcript: I think I like the smell of gunpowder.

1037576176.label: PL1700_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL2700_3
1037576176.transcript: You don't want to miss all the fun.

29033358.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
29033358.transcript: Holding out on us? That's a shame.

293501339.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
293501339.transcript: Mmm. One. Two. Three. Four. Five. Six. That's enough for today.

322187039.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
322187039.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six.

335553229.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
335553229.transcript: Are we going rapid fire today?

374582133.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
374582133.transcript: Bowmaster of the Eternals. Glad to have you on my side.

418375306.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
418375306.transcript: All right, Dad. Thanks for the joke.

500932997.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
500932997.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six.

645739459.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
645739459.transcript: Huh. Hell of a sword arm you got.

741836468.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
741836468.transcript: Huh. Huh. Huh. Huh. Huh. Huh.

915397780.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
915397780.transcript: Nice to have you watching my back.

920088612.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
920088612.transcript: Thanks. That was almost a pickle.

975590285.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
975590285.transcript: Jealous? When you're a hundred times stronger than me?

1048356404.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
1048356404.transcript: Hmm. Still got some fight left in you.

134336264.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_1
134336264.transcript: Hmm, hmm. Fisticuffs. Not really my forte.

698434854.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
698434854.transcript: You fight like a monster. I like it.

825375018.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
825375018.transcript: I've got your back on the next one too, Sandalphon.

1019210537.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
1019210537.transcript: Hey, let's keep up this pressure.

775154638.label: PL1700_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_3
775154638.transcript: A snack never hurt. Sorry for the wait.
